scripts.setup:env: bash -lc 'if [ ! -f apps/backend/.env ]; then cp apps/backend/.env.example apps/backend/.env; echo "Created backend/.env from template."; else echo "backend/.env already exists."; fi'
scripts.dev:all: npx -y concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npm --prefix apps/backend run test && npm --prefix apps/frontend run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/backend run lint && npm --prefix apps/frontend run lint
scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/backend run build && npm --prefix apps/frontend run build
scripts.type-check: npm --prefix apps/backend run type-check && npm --prefix apps/frontend run type-check
